title: Detect Pattern of Length M Repeated K or More Times
titleCn: 重复至少 K 次且长度为 M 的模式

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,4,4,4,4], m = 1, k = 3 Output: true Explanation: The pattern (4) of length 1 is repeated 4 consecutive times. Notice that pattern can be repeated k or more times but not less.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The pattern (4) of length 1 is repeated 4 consecutive times. Notice that pattern can be repeated k or more times but not less.

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,1,2,1,1,1,3], m = 2, k = 2 Output: true Explanation: The pattern (1,2) of length 2 is repeated 2 consecutive times. Another valid pattern (2,1) is also repeated 2 times.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The pattern (1,2) of length 2 is repeated 2 consecutive times. Another valid pattern (2,1) is also repeated 2 times.

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,1,2,1,3], m = 2, k = 3 Output: false Explanation: The pattern (1,2) is of length 2 but is repeated only 2 times. There is no pattern of length 2 that is repeated 3 or more times.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The pattern (1,2) is of length 2 but is repeated only 2 times. There is no pattern of length 2 that is repeated 3 or more times.
